input.background: Data representing the yearly gross income (in $\$ 10^5$) of six workers are given as follows: $$ 0.657,0.664,0.655,0.653,0.686,0.661 $$ The 0.686 value is much higher than the other five incomes. We wish to test whether the 0.686 value is an outlier?
input.question: Compute the overall mean of the given data.

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 1: Basic Probability, Statistics, and Reliability
